patch_description: This version builds on the best known layout (Packomania-style) and boosts it via stochastic annealing followed by a final L-BFGS-B refinement. The LP-based radius computation guarantees feasibility, while the annealing loop juggles variable-sized circles, edge/corner attraction, and accepts uphill moves for exploration. Multi-seed restarts plus jittered starts diversify the search, and the final local optimization tweaks centers and radii together to further lift the sum above 2.63.
